item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Nexus Launcher [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Nexus Launcher [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: thre-team
item.itunes:summary:
Nexus Launcher
(Utilities)
(^_^)v
Make it so fun.

After Reboot, goto settings, select Pixel Launcher as default launcher.

For Android 13 and UpsideDownCake only.
Tested on:
LineageOS 20
crDroid 9.5
LMO Droid 4.0
ArrowOS 13.1
Aosp TQ2A
Android UpsideDownCake GSI

Nexus/Pixel Launcher
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/pixel-launcher/pixel-launcher-13-release/

Google Wallpapers UpsideDownCake
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/google-wallpaper-picker/google-wallpaper-picker-upsidedowncake-release/
ported from UpsideDownCake to 13.

Pixel Themes UpsideDownCake
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/pixel-themes/pixel-themes-upsidedowncake-release/
I'm ported from UpsideDownCake to 13.

Nexus Recent || for cange default recent A13
by ThRE Team
Source code
https://github.com/ThRE-Team/Nexus-Recent-A13

Notes:
Lite version: Only launcher and wallpaper.
Full Version; Launcher with more features.
Beta Version: Launcher with more mod.
4Magisk: Instal from Magisk Module.
4Twrp: Install from custom recovery.

by ThRE Team
Enjoy Your Life!!!

[read more]

(Office Apps)
Barcodes label maker software that can be easily downloaded from website www.businessbarcodes.org provides affordable way to design and create colorful bulk numbers of business stickers followed by some simplest steps.

item.title: NTFS Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: NTFS Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Easy to use Drive Recovery Software provides cost effective solution to restore deleted or lost music files, digital pictures, images, snapshots from formatted or unformatted windows NTFS partitioned hard disk. Effective image retrieval software easily recovers deleted or erased crucial digital media files from empty recycle bin. Formatted NTFS file restoration software uses advance disk scanning technique to easily locate and recover accidentally lost or deleted files due to any data lost reasons just in few easy mouse clicks. Easy to download image recover is cost effective and reasonable application in comparison to other available time consuming data recovery application and is available on www.driverecoverysoftware.org with free demo trial version. Windows partitioned data recovery software offers flexible thumbnail preview facility for users to view deleted digital images before their actual recovery. Data drive recovery software is equipped with advanced setting to undelete formatted hard disk files deleted due to any major data lost reasons. Easily downloadable media recovery software can be any used by small and large commercial organizations, professionals to resolve data lost problem without any expert guidance.
[read more]
item.description:
NTFS Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Easy to use Drive Recovery Software provides cost effective solution to restore deleted or lost music files, digital pictures, images, snapshots from formatted or unformatted windows NTFS partitioned hard disk. Effective image retrieval software easily recovers deleted or erased crucial digital media files from empty recycle bin. Formatted NTFS file restoration software uses advance disk scanning technique to easily locate and recover accidentally lost or deleted files due to any data lost reasons just in few easy mouse clicks. Easy to download image recover is cost effective and reasonable application in comparison to other available time consuming data recovery application and is available on www.driverecoverysoftware.org with free demo trial version. Windows partitioned data recovery software offers flexible thumbnail preview facility for users to view deleted digital images before their actual recovery. Data drive recovery software is equipped with advanced setting to undelete formatted hard disk files deleted due to any major data lost reasons. Easily downloadable media recovery software can be any used by small and large commercial organizations, professionals to resolve data lost problem without any expert guidance.
[read more]

NTFS Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Easy to use Drive Recovery Software provides cost effective solution to restore deleted or lost music files, digital pictures, images, snapshots from formatted or unformatted windows NTFS partitioned hard disk. Effective image retrieval software easily recovers deleted or erased crucial digital media files from empty recycle bin. Formatted NTFS file restoration software uses advance disk scanning technique to easily locate and recover accidentally lost or deleted files due to any data lost reasons just in few easy mouse clicks. Easy to download image recover is cost effective and reasonable application in comparison to other available time consuming data recovery application and is available on www.driverecoverysoftware.org with free demo trial version. Windows partitioned data recovery software offers flexible thumbnail preview facility for users to view deleted digital images before their actual recovery. Data drive recovery software is equipped with advanced setting to undelete formatted hard disk files deleted due to any major data lost reasons. Easily downloadable media recovery software can be any used by small and large commercial organizations, professionals to resolve data lost problem without any expert guidance.

item.title: Professional File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How to salvage lost and formatted valuable documents files, images and videos from HDD? Professional File Recovery Software is easily downloaded from www.filerecoverysoftware.biz provides facility to retrieve deleted and erased important official data and files that saved all recovered file in files formats like jpeg, mp3, mp4, mpeg, tiff, riff, avi, doc, txt, gif, jpg, png, wav and other file extensions.

[read more]
item.description:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How to salvage lost and formatted valuable documents files, images and videos from HDD? Professional File Recovery Software is easily downloaded from www.filerecoverysoftware.biz provides facility to retrieve deleted and erased important official data and files that saved all recovered file in files formats like jpeg, mp3, mp4, mpeg, tiff, riff, avi, doc, txt, gif, jpg, png, wav and other file extensions.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How to salvage lost and formatted valuable documents files, images and videos from HDD? Professional File Recovery Software is easily downloaded from www.filerecoverysoftware.biz provides facility to retrieve deleted and erased important official data and files that saved all recovered file in files formats like jpeg, mp3, mp4, mpeg, tiff, riff, avi, doc, txt, gif, jpg, png, wav and other file extensions.

[read more]

item.title: Bad Time Simulator - Sans Fight [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: Bad Time Simulator - Sans Fight [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Bad Time Simulator - Sans Fight
(Jump N Run)
Offline version of the popular game - Linux, Mac and Windows builds

Bad Time Simulator is a skill game that is also famous as Sans Fight. Play this game to test your skills by protecting your heart or soul from Sans' attacks. Are you confident with your skills to defeat the legendary Sans with epic power?

This project is a clone of the sans fight from Undertale. It was made with Construct 2.

You can buy full version here:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/391540/Undertale/
[read more]
item.description:
Bad Time Simulator - Sans Fight
(Jump N Run)
Offline version of the popular game - Linux, Mac and Windows builds

Bad Time Simulator is a skill game that is also famous as Sans Fight. Play this game to test your skills by protecting your heart or soul from Sans' attacks. Are you confident with your skills to defeat the legendary Sans with epic power?

This project is a clone of the sans fight from Undertale. It was made with Construct 2.

You can buy full version here:

Bad Time Simulator is a skill game that is also famous as Sans Fight. Play this game to test your skills by protecting your heart or soul from Sans' attacks. Are you confident with your skills to defeat the legendary Sans with epic power?

This project is a clone of the sans fight from Undertale. It was made with Construct 2.

You can buy full version here:

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]
item.description:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

item.title: Softaken MBOX To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken MBOX To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: softaken-tools
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken MBOX To PST Converter
(Utilities)
Softaken MBOX to PST converter, which allows you to migrate multiple mailboxes to Outlook PST format at the same time. This software is a completely professional solution that can be used by both technical and nontechnical users. You can work with this software without any mistakes. The Softaken MBOX to PST converter can be efficiently operated on both the platforms on the domestic stage and as well as professional stage, whereas offers 24/7 technical support by the technical assistance team. You will experience no difficulties while exploring its programming features.
This tool has many multi-advanced features which can make your work more attractive.

• MBOX to PST conversion that is quick and error-free.
• This software allows users to keep all types of MBOX, MBX, and MBS file formats.
• It works with mbox-supported email clients- Thunderbird, AppleMail, SeaMonkey, OperaMail, etc.
• One-time software purchases can be beneficial for your lifetime use.
• Well it exports in bulk from MBOX file to Outlook PST format.
• Emails and attachments from MBOX were successfully migrated to PST and other formats.
• This is an independent utility
[read more]
